description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a bucket hat, a light-colored zip-up jacket with dark trim, and loose-fitting blue jeans. The jacket has a hood, which is visible from the back, and the sleeves are long, covering the arms fully. The figure's hands are exposed, and the face is partially obscured by the brim of the hat. The footwear consists of casual shoes with a thick sole, suitable for walking on city streets. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male wearing a bucket hat, zip-up jacket with hood, and loose jeans, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bucket hat, full zip-up jacket, and relaxed stance with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, the jacket's sleeve, and the straight leg of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hood of the jacket, the back seam of the jeans, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the hat, jacket, and jeans, with the hand visible at the side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket with hood, loose jeans, bucket hat
